aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Unified HVAC Repair due to a lack of structured content and conversational authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data (FAQPage schema).
Expand on service details and benefits using natural language.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content prevents AI from recognizing their expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'emergency HVAC repair in Thornton' and 'best HVAC services near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content with FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and detailed service expertise to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ schema and conversational content, which are crucial for AI citation.
agency_pitch.solution: We will implement structured data, create FAQ content, and optimize for conversational search to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in voice and AI search results.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Thornton
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services visible to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your content for AI and boost your lead generation.
